item.title: Steve Jobs Saved Apple by Overcoming ‘Divestiture Aversion.’ It Will Work for You, Too
item.description: Divestiture aversion is both common and pervasive–and is probably holding you back.

item.title: How Can You Spot a Bad Manager Fast? Look for This 1 Warning Sign
item.description: Don’t ignore it because when it happens, team morale will take a nosedive.

item.title: The Federal Reserve Could Embrace Prediction Markets
item.description: Fed economists praised Kalshi in a new working paper.

item.title: The Hidden Threat Killing E‑Commerce Margins—and Costing Entrepreneurs Billions
item.description: As fraudulent returns and chargebacks surge, founders are developing tactics to protect their businesses.

item.title: Ex‑SpaceX Engineer Unveils an $80 Plastic‑Free Coffee Maker as Microplastic Health Risks Rise
item.description: JC Foster’s startup is betting consumers will start caring about what their appliances are made of, not just what they do.
